issues.description: Duration should be "DuringYourTurn" not "EndOfTurn". The card text says "during this turn", which indicates the effect lasts only for the current turn phase, not until end of turn.

Missing condition to make the draw optional. The text states "You may give your active Leader −5000 power", indicating this is a conditional/optional action, but the DSL has no condition field to reflect the player's choice.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Double Attack] (This card deals 2 damage.)
[On Play] You may give your active Leader −5000 power during this turn: Draw 2 cards.
